name: UNMASK ME
description: UNMASK ME is a local-first Gemma 4 nervous-system sanctuary by PHENOMENAL MARK (PSFREQUENCY). It runs six somatic protocols (Box Breathe, Somatic Shake, Vagus Hum, Jaw Release, EFT Tap, Ground Stomp), forges a procedural 3D Spirit Charm from a three-question intake, and grows an adaptive Swarm that learns the user's resilience pattern — all without face frames, voice, or reflections leaving the device. Built for the Gemma 4 Good Hackathon (Main Track + Impact Track: Safety & Trust + Special Tech Track: Ollama).
author: PHENOMENAL MARK (PSFREQUENCY)
majorCapabilities: Multimodal pre/post somatic face shift scoring
Email-only account, no telemetry, no backend
